# Hawaii Revised Statutes (unofficial, searchable)

> A free, public-domain copy of the Hawaii Revised Statutes (HRS) — 14 volumes, 1,108 chapters, 19,840 sections — with full-text search and legislative history (enacting Acts, bill numbers, effective dates, and Governor signing dates, 1999–2025). Unofficial reproduction; verify against the official source.

This site is static and openly crawlable — no rate limits, no login. AI agents and researchers are welcome to read, index, cite, and reuse the content (public-domain government law).

## Site structure
- Section pages: https://kailuahrs.github.io/hawaii-statutes/s/{section}/  (e.g. /s/291E-61/)
- Chapter pages: https://kailuahrs.github.io/hawaii-statutes/c/{chapter}/  (e.g. /c/711/)
- Search & browse app: https://kailuahrs.github.io/hawaii-statutes/
- Full URL list: https://kailuahrs.github.io/hawaii-statutes/sitemap.xml

## Machine-readable data (JSON)
- Section index (browse tree, catchlines, URL slugs): https://kailuahrs.github.io/hawaii-statutes/data/index-meta.json
- Full section text, by volume: https://kailuahrs.github.io/hawaii-statutes/data/volumes/{Volume}.json
- Acts (bill number, effective date, title; 1999–2025): https://kailuahrs.github.io/hawaii-statutes/data/acts.json
- Governor signing dates, by bill: https://kailuahrs.github.io/hawaii-statutes/data/signdates.json
- Updates feed (RSS): https://kailuahrs.github.io/hawaii-statutes/feed.xml

## Citing
Bluebook form: Haw. Rev. Stat. § {section}  (e.g., Haw. Rev. Stat. § 291E-61).

## Important caveats
- Unofficial reproduction; not legal advice. Official HRS: https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/hrscurrent/
- In any conflict, the Session Laws of Hawaii control; the HRS is "prima facie evidence of the law" (HRS §23G-15).
- Statute text retrieved June 2026; may not reflect later amendments.

## More
- About & privacy: https://kailuahrs.github.io/hawaii-statutes/#/about
- Sources & build notes: https://kailuahrs.github.io/hawaii-statutes/#/build
- For researchers & AI: https://kailuahrs.github.io/hawaii-statutes/#/data
